title: Aspidogyne mayoriana
taxonomy: Aspidogyne mayoriana is a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. It belongs to the genus Aspidogyne, which is a small group of terrestrial orchids. The species was first described in 2001 and is native to the Philippines. Aspidogyne mayoriana is classified as an epiphytic orchid, meaning it grows on other plants or rocks. It is considered an endangered species due to habitat loss and degradation.
